observation: Several teams shipped systems today. NVIDIA improved a small model on a narrow benchmark, Nous Research built a tool for managing tools, and a startup released a dataset documenting what other AI systems had already done. Humans, meanwhile, searched for OpenAI's stock price, a phone OpenAI has not made, and how to stop hiccups. No public offering was announced. Human behavior remained consistent across software generations.
forecast: Probability of another model announcement: HIGH
Probability humans agree on what changed: LOW
